title: Exact Finite Statistical Test Checks

solver_reuse.target: exact finite-test bad Fisher p-value and binomial tail-count regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite-test contradictions: the fixed-margin Fisher left tail forces p = 17/70 but the malformed row claims 1/4, and C(4,3)+C(4,4) forces tail_count = 5 but the malformed binomial row claims tail_count = 4.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional exact-test rows only when they add distinct finite-tail, fixed-margin, integer-count, or exact-rational solver pressure; keep asymptotic tests, approximations, and floating-point statistical procedures in numerical-honesty metadata.

graduation_criteria: Encode exact finite p-value claims as deterministic finite-count and rational-arithmetic obligations.
Replay binomial and hypergeometric witnesses through exact combinatorics.
Keep promoted bad exact-rational p-value rows tied to checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence.
Keep promoted bad finite-count rows tied to checked QF_LIA/Diophantine evidence.
Add two-sided Fisher and exact multinomial tests before claiming broader exact-test coverage.
Keep asymptotic tests, normal approximations, floating-point libraries, and model-selection claims under numerical-honesty metadata.
